event: View of the Tiber at Ponte Molle near Rome
description: A detailed architectural engraving showing the Ponte Molle (Milvian Bridge) over the Tiber River near Rome. A large stone bridge with a single prominent arch spans the center of the composition. Atop the bridge stands a crenellated medieval tower or gatehouse in partial ruin. Small figures and travelers are visible on and near the bridge. The riverbank in the foreground shows scattered stones and vegetation. Dramatic clouds fill the sky above. Text and inscriptions appear at the bottom of the print.

_meta.title: View of the Tiber on the Ponte Molle, two miles away from Rome
